use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in web application interfaces
Form submission triggers with multiple visual states
Interactive navigation and menu action buttons
Destructive action buttons with hover and focus feedback
Secondary and ghost-style buttons for layered UI hierarchies
ai_summary: DepthButton is a versatile atomic button component with multiple variants including default, outline, ghost, secondary, tertiary, destructive, and link styles. Built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for flexible composition, it features subtle shine effects, shadow styling, and comprehensive state management including hover glow interactions and focus-visible accessibility rings.
